ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court */,
  "court_address" TEXT /* Full address of the court, including street, city, state, and zip code */,
  "court_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the court */,
  "court_state" TEXT /* State where the court is located */,
  "court_circuit" TEXT /* Circuit to which the court belongs */,
  "court_type" TEXT /* Type of court (e.g., supreme, appellate, district) */,
  "court_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the court (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "court_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the court */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courts_court_circuit FOREIGN KEY ("court_circuit") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courts_court_state FOREIGN KEY ("court_state") REFERENCES states ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court to which the judge is assigned */,
  "judge_title" TEXT /* Title of the judge (e.g., Judge, Justice, Magistrate) */,
  "judge_specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the judge (e.g., civil, criminal, family) */,
  "judge_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judges_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the court administrator */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court where the administrator works */,
  "admin_title" TEXT /* Title of the administrator (e.g., Clerk, Administrator, Manager) */,
  "admin_department" TEXT /* Department to which the administrator belongs (e.g., finance, HR, operations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_administrators_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circuits" (
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit */,
  "circuit_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit */,
  "circuit_description" TEXT /* Description of the circuit */,
  "circuit_jurisdiction" TEXT /* Geographical or topical jurisdiction of the circuit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_judge_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge assignment */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the judge was assigned to the court */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_judge_assignments_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_judge_assignments_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_admin_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court administrator assignment */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court administrator */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the court administrator was assigned to the court */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_admin_assignments_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_admin_assignments_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES court_administrators ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., judge, court administrator, support staff) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_state_circuit" (
  "court_state_circuit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court-state-circuit relationship */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Nature of the relationship between the court, state, and circuit (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_state_circuit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_state_circuit_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_state_circuit_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_state_circuit_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)
